We'd love to hear from you

Pick the right channel below — we'll get back within 24 hours on weekdays, 48 hours on weekends.

Support

Need help with an account?

Lost access, billing issues, subscription changes, refund requests, or technical problems.

Found a bug or have a feature idea?

We read every message. Your feedback directly shapes what we build next.

Press, partnerships, or business

Media enquiries, interview requests, affiliate programmes, or enterprise licensing.

hello@numerastra.com

Before you email: many questions are answered in our FAQ. If your account was just created and you can't log in, try waiting 60 seconds — OTP delivery can take a moment on some networks.
